{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Gold workers
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Pride]] was supervising the return of the [[Gold workers]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
